ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's school */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's job */,
  "num_details" INTEGER /* Number of details provided by the user */,
  "unknown" INTEGER /* Unknown field (possibly a flag or placeholder) */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename for additional data (if any) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "interested_in" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "profile_completed" INTEGER /* Whether the user has completed their profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the user at the school */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study at the school */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Graduation date from the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the user works */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's job */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date the user started working at the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "detail_type" TEXT /* Type of the detail (e.g., education, job) */,
  "detail_value" TEXT /* Value of the detail */,
  "detail_category" TEXT /* Category of the detail */,
  "detail_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the media */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the interaction */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, like) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  "setting_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of the search */,
  "search_category" TEXT /* Category of the search */,
  "search_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback */,
  "feedback_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "matched_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matched user */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_matches_matched_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("matched_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_matches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
